description:
Post-finalization design revision. FLIPS the §4 sentence 'There is likewise no plugins config list — the filesystem symlink registry (§6) IS the plugin chain' 180 degrees.

WHY: the symlink registry (config/plugins/<op>/<phase>/NN-<name> -> ../../bin/<name>) reinvented an ordered list — order via NN- string-prefix sorting, a sysvinit/rc.d tic — as a SECOND config mechanism running parallel to balls.toml's §4 layering. But §4 ALREADY has ordered lists with merge directives (compose_list / _prepend/_append/_ban, built + tested in config.rs). So the schedule belongs in config, not the filesystem: ONE layering mechanism, not two. Subtraction (§0: minimize interface, subtract mechanism).

WHAT (deliverable = docs/architecture.md revision + a §15 revision-log entry):
- The HOOK SCHEDULE moves to a committed, §4-layered config/plugins.toml — a [hooks] table mapping <op>.<phase> -> an ORDERED LIST of plugin names. List position = run order (tracker runs last because it is last in the list). Replaces the <op>/<phase>/NN-<name> symlink tree entirely.
- The BIN folder STAYS: config/plugins/<name> machine-local gitignored symlinks — install drops a symlink, dispatch resolves name->binary. The schedule moves OUT of the dir into plugins.toml; the dir becomes purely the name->binary map.
- Order is a BARE POSITIONAL LIST (not {name,order}); the file is not the unit of atomicity (per user).
- install: Object::Plugins-as-symlink-mirror dissolves into a config copy; plugins.toml is layered + installed like balls.toml ('handled like the others'); resolve_and_bind (the binary bind + protocol validation) stays.
- §6 'the registry is the filesystem' -> 'the hook list is config'; §2 drops the <op>/<phase>/NN-<name> tree from the layout but keeps config/plugins/<name> bin symlinks; §1/§4 cross-refs updated.

LOSES (honest): sparse mid-phase insertion. NN- was a sparse integer keyspace (slot in at 70 between 50 and 90); a positional list with _prepend/_append only lands at an END of a phase — mid-insertion needs a full-list replacement. The one HARD order constraint (tracker's irreversible push sorts LAST, §8) is held because _prepend covers 'run before the push'. Accepted.

Bonus: collapses bl-4e14's seed to a plain text file (include_str!, no build.rs, no symlink-embedding wart).
title: Spec §2/§4/§6: plugins.toml hook-list replaces the filesystem symlink registry
